language.unsupported: ❌ Please choose a language using the buttons below.
start.enter_email:
Please enter your NES alumni e-mail to continue

If you've lost access to e-mail, ask for /help
start.email_invalid: An email should have '@nes.ru' in it
start.email_taken: ❌ This email is already registered by another account.
start.sent_code:
We've sent you a code.
Please provide it here
start.code_invalid:
The code is incorrect.
Please try again
start.code_attempts_exhausted:
You've entered the wrong code 3 times.
Please wait {minutes} minutes before trying again.
start.code_expired:
⏰ This code has expired.
Please enter your email again to get a new one.
start.code_rate_limited: Please wait {seconds} more second(s) before requesting another code for this email.
start.email_cooldown: Please wait {minutes} more minute(s) before entering your email again.
start.verified: 🎉 You've become a verified user with full access to bot's functionality!
start.about_prompt: Would you like to write a short bio about yourself? It helps other alumni get to know you.
start.checking_email:
🔎 Checking your email in the NES database…
Please wait
start.email_check_failed: ⚠️ We couldn't verify your email right now. Please try again in a moment.
start.email_not_in_nes:
❌ We couldn't find this email in the NES alumni database.
Please double-check and enter your NES email again.
start.email_not_shared:
🔒 We found your NES profile, but it isn't shared in the alumni directory, so we can't verify you yet.

Please enable “Show in a class' directory” in your profile settings on my.nes.ru, then send your email again.
start.email_not_in_nes_admin: ⚠️ User {username} (ID: {chat_id}) tried to register with email `{email}` but it was not found in the NES system.
start.not_alumni:
❌ Your email was found, but you are not registered as a NES alumni yet.
Please contact NES or try again later.
settings.hidden_empty:
🚫 Hidden profiles

You haven't hidden any profiles yet. When you hide a profile from your search results, it will appear here so you can unhide it.
settings.privacy_header:
🔒 My data & privacy

Manage the data NESpresso stores about you.
settings.export_intro: 📤 Here is a copy of all the data we store about you:
settings.delete_confirm_header:
⚠️ Delete your account?

This permanently removes your profile, messages, reactions and match history, and takes you out of search and matching. This cannot be undone.
settings.delete_done: 🗑 Your account and data have been deleted. Send /start any time if you'd like to register again.
help.panel_header:
❓ Help

If you need assistance, you can send a help request to the admins. They will receive your message and get back to you.
help.request_sent: ✅ Your help request has been sent to the admins.
help.request_cooldown: ⏳ You've already sent a help request. Please wait a few minutes before sending another — the admins have your message.
find.enter_query:
🔍 Who are you looking for? Describe them in plain language — filters work too.

Examples:
• works at Sberbank in Moscow
• HFT quant
• PhD from MIT
find.rate_limited: Please wait a moment before searching again.
find.too_long:
Your text is too long.
Please, reduce it by {percent}%
find.all_hidden:
🚫 Profile hidden.

No more results to show.
find.try_another: Try describing them differently, or search by company, city, role, or university.
find.daily_limit: 🔎 You've reached your daily search limit. Please try again tomorrow.
admin.panel_header:
⚙️ Admin Panel

• 📋 Logs — download bot logs
• 💬 Messages — view messages of a user
• 📤 Send — send a message to a user
• 📢 Send All — broadcast to all verified users
• 🚫 Blocking — block or unblock a user
• ⚙️ Matching — run matching or request feedback
• 👥 Admins — manage admin list
• 📊 Statistics — view platform analytics
• 🏷️ Title — edit the hub panel header
• 🎓 MyNES — import alumni from MyNES
admin.logs_header:
📋 Logs

Download the bot logs:

• ⚡ Quick — concise terminal-style logs (INFO)
• 🐛 Debug — full structured logs (DEBUG)
admin.broadcast_enter_text: Input text of message to broadcast:
admin.messages_enter_args: Enter a username or NES email and a message limit (e.g. "@vbalab 15" or "ivan@nes.ru 15"):
admin.user_not_found: ❌ User with such credentials doesn't exist.
admin.limit_not_number:
❌ Limit should be a number, e.g. 50
Try again
admin.send_enter_username: Enter a Telegram username (e.g. @vbalab) or NES email:
admin.title_enter_en: Send the new English hub title:
admin.title_enter_ru: Send the new Russian hub title:
admin.title_blank: ❌ The title can't be blank — that would break the hub for every user. Please send some actual text.
admin.mynes_header:
🎓 MyNES Directory Sync

Alumni profiles are mirrored from the MyNES directory automatically every hour (Postgres + search index). Use the button below to run a sync right now.
admin.mynes_sync_running: ⏳ Syncing from the MyNES directory… The first run can take a few minutes while profiles are indexed.
admin.mynes_sync_busy: ⏳ A sync is already in progress. Please wait for it to finish.
admin.mynes_sync_failed: ❌ MyNES sync failed. Check the logs for details.
admin.blocking_not_found: ❌ No user @{username} found. They need to start the bot first.
admin.blocking_is_admin: ❌ @{username} is an admin and cannot be blocked.
admin.admins_enter_add: Enter username of the new admin (e.g. @vbalab):
admin.admins_enter_remove: Enter username of the admin to remove (e.g. @vbalab):
admin.admins_not_found: ❌ No user @{username} found. They need to start the bot first.
admin.admins_cannot_remove_self: ❌ You cannot remove your own admin permissions.
admin.matching_header:
⚙️ Matching Panel

Run a new matching round or request feedback from the last round.
admin.matching_demo_running: 🧪 Building a demo matching… (dry run — nobody is notified)
admin.matching_demo_empty: No eligible users to match right now.
admin.matching_demo_done: ✅ Demo matching ready — {users} users, {pairs} pairs. No round was saved and no notifications were sent. See the attached Excel.
admin.matching_in_progress: ⏳ A matching round is already being created right now. Please wait for it to finish.
admin.matching_cooldown: ⏳ A round was already run recently. Please wait about {minutes} more minute(s) before running another.
admin.matching_no_rounds: No matching rounds have been run yet.
admin.matching_no_assignments: No assignments found in the last round.
admin.matching_feedback_already_sent: ❌ Feedback was already requested for the last round (on {when}). Run a new matching round before requesting feedback again.
matching.intro:
👋 Hi! This is NESpresso — the New Economic School alumni networking bot you registered with.

Every so often we run a matching round: alumni get paired up to meet — a coffee, a call, whatever works. A new round just started, and we picked {count} fellow alum for you.

I'll send their profile(s) in the next message(s). Take a look and feel free to reach out to set something up. ☕️
matching.feedback_question: 👋 Hi! A quick follow-up on your last NESpresso matching round — were you able to connect with {name}?
matching.feedback_invalid: This feedback request is no longer valid.
admin.stats_header:
📊 Statistics

Choose a category to view:
admin.stats_db_header:
⬇️ Download DB

Choose a table to download:
admin.stats_users:
📊 User Statistics

👥 Total users: {total}
✅ Verified: {verified} ({verified_pct})
⏳ Unverified: {unverified} ({unverified_pct})
🚫 Blocked: {blocked} ({blocked_pct})

🌐 Language (among verified):
  • EN: {lang_en} ({lang_en_pct})
  • RU: {lang_ru} ({lang_ru_pct})

📝 Profile completeness:
  • With @username: {with_username} ({with_username_pct})
  • With bio: {with_about} ({with_about_pct})

📅 New registrations:
  • Last 7 days: {new_week}
  • Last 30 days: {new_month}
about.enter_text: Send your bio as a text message:
about.too_long: ✍️ That's a bit long — your text is {current} characters, but the limit is {max}. Please shorten it and send it again.
about.preview_header: 👀 This is how other alumni see your profile:
about.preview_no_profile: You don't have an alumni profile linked yet, so there's nothing to preview.
about.complete_tip: 📝 Tip: add a short About so other alumni can find and get to know you.
common.button_outdated: This button is outdated. Please use /start to reopen the menu.
common.spam_blocked: 🚫 You've been sending messages too fast. You're temporarily blocked for 1 hour due to spamming — please try again after that.
common.directory_unshared: 🔒 Your profile is no longer shared in the NES directory, so NESpresso is paused. Re-enable “Show in a class' directory” on my.nes.ru to restore access within an hour.

Use /start to open the menu
zero.not_text_idle:
The bot only works with text messages.
Use /start to open the menu
zero.not_text_in_state:
